stories.title: Sinner vs Rublev — ATP Rome QF (Record on the Line)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Sinner has 31 consecutive Masters 1000 wins — tied with Djokovic for the all-time record.

One more today vs. Rublev and he owns it alone.

The Career Golden Masters quest continues at Rome. 🎾

#TennisRecap #ItalianOpen #Sinner #ATP

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Win No. 32 today = sole owner of the all-time Masters 1000 winning streak.

Rome is the ONLY Masters title Sinner hasn't won.

History on two fronts in one match. 🏆 #TennisRecap #ItalianOpen #ATP

stories.title: Swiatek Dominates Pegula 6-1, 6-2 — Into Rome SF

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Iga Swiatek dropped just 3 games against Pegula (6-1, 6-2) to reach the Rome semifinals.

Pegula had won their last 2 meetings. Not today.

Roland Garros is 12 days away and Swiatek looks ready. 🎾 #TennisRecap #ItalianOpen #WTA

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
New coach. Dominant tennis.

Swiatek obliterated Pegula 6-1, 6-2 in Rome.

Under Francisco Roig, the four-time Roland Garros champion is building the form she needs — and the clay Slam is 12 days out. 🔥 #TennisRecap #WTA #ItalianOpen

stories.title: Gauff Survives Andreeva on 5th Match Point — Into Rome SF

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Gauff def. Andreeva 4-6 6-2 6-4 in 2h17m — needed five match points to close it.

The Rome semifinal is set: defending RG champion Gauff vs. 36-year-old fairy tale Cirstea.

This is unmissable. 🎾 #TennisRecap #ItalianOpen #WTA

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Coco Gauff was up 5-1 in the third. Got broken. Needed 5 match points. Still won.

That's a Roland Garros champion. She's through to the Rome SF vs. Cirstea (4-6, 6-2, 6-4). 🏆 #TennisRecap #ItalianOpen #Gauff

stories.title: Cirstea's Fairytale — Into First Career Rome SF at 36

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Sorana Cirstea is 36. In her final season. Just reached her FIRST career Rome semifinal.

She beat Sabalenka (No. 1) and Ostapenko to get here.

The Cinderella story of clay season continues. ✨ #TennisRecap #ItalianOpen #WTA

stories.title: Jodar vs Darderi — All-Youth ATP Rome QF

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Tonight in Rome: 19yo Jodar (youngest QFer here since Djokovic in 2007) vs. Darderi, who stunned Zverev from 4 match points down.

Winner faces Sinner in the semis.

This is the match. 🎾 #TennisRecap #ItalianOpen #ATP
